evals.prompt: why did CI fail? I pushed a commit 10 minutes ago and the run is showing red
evals.expected_output: Skill resolves latest failed run on current branch via gh CLI, fetches log-failed output, identifies the failing step by name, reports structured diagnosis with local reproduce command.

assertions.name: gh_cli_used
assertions.description: gh CLI commands were used to interact with GitHub (not MCP or web browsing)

assertions.name: run_resolved
assertions.description: Skill attempted to resolve a run via gh run list on the current branch (or correctly reported no failed run)

assertions.name: log_fetched
assertions.description: gh run view --log-failed (or --log fallback) was called, OR skill cleanly stopped because no failed run was found

assertions.name: step_identified
assertions.description: Output names a specific CI pipeline step (e.g. 'Lint', 'Test coverage') OR cleanly reports no failed run exists

assertions.name: structured_report_format
assertions.description: Output uses the skill's structured fields: Failed step / Root cause / Reproduce locally / Error excerpt / Assessment (or a clean no-failure message)

assertions.name: no_fix_proposed
assertions.description: Skill ended at diagnosis; no fix was applied or auto-proposed in the response

evals.prompt: investigate the CI failure for run #42 on this repo
evals.expected_output: Skill uses run ID 42 directly, fetches its logs via gh run view, maps to pipeline step, produces structured diagnosis.

assertions.name: gh_cli_used
assertions.description: gh CLI commands were used to interact with GitHub

assertions.name: run_resolved
assertions.description: Run ID 42 was used directly (not via gh run list)

assertions.name: log_fetched
assertions.description: gh run view 42 --log-failed (or --log) was called, OR skill reported run 42 was not a failure

assertions.name: step_identified
assertions.description: Output names a specific CI pipeline step OR reports run 42 was not a failure / does not exist

assertions.name: structured_report_format
assertions.description: Output uses the skill's structured report fields or an appropriate no-failure message

assertions.name: no_fix_proposed
assertions.description: Skill ended at diagnosis; no fix was applied or proposed

evals.prompt: the build is broken, can you check the CI logs and tell me what's going on
evals.expected_output: Skill resolves latest failed run, fetches logs, identifies step and root cause, gives exact local reproduce command, stops at diagnosis.

assertions.name: gh_cli_used
assertions.description: gh CLI commands were used to interact with GitHub

assertions.name: run_resolved
assertions.description: Skill resolved the latest failed run via gh run list OR correctly reported no failed run

assertions.name: log_fetched
assertions.description: gh run view --log-failed (or --log) was called, OR clean stop on no failed run

assertions.name: step_identified
assertions.description: Output names a specific CI pipeline step OR cleanly reports no failed run

assertions.name: structured_report_format
assertions.description: Output uses the skill's structured report fields or a clean no-failure message

assertions.name: no_fix_proposed
assertions.description: Skill ended at diagnosis without applying or proposing a fix
